allow: Bash(python3 -c "import cv2; print\('cv2', cv2.__version__\); print\('haar path', cv2.data.haarcascades\); import os; print\('frontal exists', os.path.exists\(cv2.data.haarcascades+'haarcascade_frontalface_default.xml'\)\); print\('profile exists', os.path.exists\(cv2.data.haarcascades+'haarcascade_profileface.xml'\)\)")
